name: AWS Knowledge
description: Migrate from GCP to AWS — including your entire AI stack. Moves infrastructure (Cloud Run → Fargate, Cloud SQL → RDS or Aurora, GKE → EKS), OpenAI/Gemini workloads to Amazon Bedrock, and agentic systems (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK) to AWS-native frameworks. Generates runnable Terraform, migration scripts, provider adapters, and deployment artifacts. Gives honest model-by-model pricing comparison...
